name: Smartling Translation Management API
what_it_does: Smartling REST API for enterprise translation management system. Enables AI agents to upload content for translation, retrieve translated files, manage translation projects and workflows, track translation progress, and integrate professional localization into enterprise workflows. Smartling is an enterprise-grade TMS with strong professional translator network.
use_cases: Uploading source content and downloading translations from content localization agents
Querying translation project status and cost estimates from finance workflow agents
Managing translation workflows and vendor assignments from localization ops agents
Integrating Smartling translations into enterprise CMS and product build agents
not_for: Developer-only key/string management without professional translation needs
Real-time machine translation (Smartling integrates MT but is workflow-focused)
best_when: An enterprise globalization team using Smartling wants AI agents to automate content submission, track translation projects, and integrate professional TMS data into content and product workflows.
avoid_when: For developer-centric l10n workflows, Phrase or Lokalise may be more accessible. Smartling is enterprise-focused with higher cost.

auth.notes: Smartling uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials. User identifier + user secret to obtain access token. Tokens expire and require refresh.

pricing.notes: Enterprise TMS with professional translator network. Pricing includes platform fee plus word-based translation costs.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per account and endpoint; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
OAuth tokens expire — agents must refresh using client credentials
Translation jobs are long-running — design agents for async polling
File URI format is Smartling-specific — use consistent naming conventions
Professional translation workflows involve human translators — not instant
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise translation content including marketing and legal documents. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency. OAuth2 token auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise translation content may include sensitive product and legal text. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency.
